findings.description: PascalCase class `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` is referenced in the s4 content (XML example uses `nablarch.fw.handler.RequestPathJavaPackageMapping`) but is absent from the s4 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `nablarch.fw.handler.RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` appears in the XML config example under 「AsyncMessageSendActionの適用」. Knowledge file s4 content includes the same XML but does not list `RequestPathJavaPackageMapping` in hints.
